# UNIMARC test data

## `iccu-unimarc.dat`

A real UNIMARC bibliographic record (an Italian edition of an Isaac Asimov novel,
catalogued by ICCU) used to exercise the UNIMARC reader, accessors and the
MARC 21 crosswalk. It is UTF-8 (UNIMARC character-set code "50") and uses the
non-sort control characters in the title.

Source: the [pymarc](https://gitlab.com/pymarc/pymarc) project's
`test/testunimarc.dat`, copyright Ed Summers and contributors, BSD-2-Clause.
Unmodified, redistributed under that license for testing.
